value.stringValue: Create Opp Upon SDR Meeting Completion

rules.name: myRule_14
rules.label: Named Sales Manager as Meeting Owner

rules.name: myRule_26
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8) AND 4 AND 5 AND 9
rules.label: SW Industry Fill

rules.name: myRule_26_pmetrule
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8) AND 4 AND 5 AND 9
rules.label: Previously Met - Prev

Flow.description: MIS-1682 Update SDR Upsell Owner to be dependent on Status MIS-1551 new automation for SDR Upsell record type. MIS-1467 Meetings Owner automation (AM Meetings). 2 nodes to set Meeting Owner (depended on RT) were added, MIS-1578 SMB AM Meeting to create 10% Opp

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ischanged ([Meeting__c].Status__c ) ), [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = "SDR_for_Upsell", NOT(ISBLANK([Meeting__c].Account__c)), text([Meeting__c].Status__c ) = 'Pending' )

AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED( [Meeting__c].Status__c) ),
NOT( ISBLANK( [Meeting__c].Account__c )), [Meeting__c].SYSHasRelatedOpp__c = FALSE, ISPICKVAL( [Meeting__c].Status__c , 'Completed'),
OR( [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='AE', [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='Chat', [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='Inside_Sales', [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='MIR_Handover', [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='SDR', [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='SDR_for_Upsell', [Meeting__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='SMB_AM' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_28
formulas.expression:
AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED( {!myVariable_current.Status__c}) ),
NOT( ISBLANK( {!myVariable_current.Account__c} )), {!myVariable_current.SYSHasRelatedOpp__c} = FALSE, ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Status__c} , 'Completed'),
OR( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='AE', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='Chat', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='Inside_Sales', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='MIR_Handover', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='SDR', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='SDR_for_Upsell', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='SMB_AM' ) )

Flow.label: Meeting - all automation

recordUpdates.name: myRule_30_A2
recordUpdates.label: Update Most Recent Meeting on Contact
